title: Looking for a Monday Volunteer Tech

posts.author: LunarVixen (Carolyn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am looking for where one can find experts willing to help small, not-for-profit organizations develop their workspace.

We are trying to develop some kind of multiple project management system, but none of the templates we have explored are providing us with our needs. I think we are getting analysis paralysis for what we can create.

I am finding that Monday can do things (as evidenced in their templates and apps) but when I see something I would like to incorporate, there is nothing to indicate how I can match those settings in a column.

I find it utterly inefficient to not be able to have different columns in different groups on a single project board. We do a variety of project types for a multitude of clients… and we can’t even get a basic template because of how little customization we are finding on Monday.com which probably stems from the analysis paralysis.

We are looking for an Obiwan to help us create something so that we could finally start using what we have.

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LunarVixen

I would love to see how we (Kick consulting) can help you. We specialise in NFP and have a tailored solution to do exactly what you need it.

Please book straight into my calendar and let’s see if that solution will work for you guys.

Thx
Elena
Founder of Kick.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @LunarVixen

Thanks for reaching out to the community! By using the Project Portfolio Management Template, you can easily plan, track, and handle complex projects across multiple departments. By creating columns and boards, you can monitor multiple projects through each stage. Similarly, overseeing deadlines and prioritizing work schedules becomes easier with this template implementation. The same template can be helpful in instantly receiving new requests and easily organizing your whole portfolio in one interface.

If you’re seeking help to implement boards and regulate projects, working with a team of monday.com consultants is beneficial. These consultants can customize templates and deploy high-level dashboards to help you push projects forward, quickly.
